# render-diff

Diff renderer for the commands facet in the PR review pane. Contributes a
`DiffRenderer` that projects each plugin's commands to one `Group.Member`
string per `defineCommand` (via `commandsToComparable` in the facet `core/`),
mirroring `renderDoc`, so the host can diff a plugin's commands between the
worktree and main. No legacy `commandStrings()` existed — this defines the
commands diff.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Diff renderer for the commands facet (PR review).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginChanges.DiffRenderer` "Commands"
